view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a simple online booking page is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for a simple online booking page as evidenced by the linked use case, which describes a scenario where clients can visit a booking page, select available time slots, and complete bookings. Additionally, the prior step evidence shows that customers have successfully booked appointments, confirming the functionality of the booking page. The presence of confirmed bookings and the detailed description of the booking process directly support the requirement's coverage.
